sections.draft_text: The Supplier's Quotation includes pricing on the basis of Fixed Price, Outcome Based T&M (capped at a NTE Price), Time and Materials (T&M) (capped at a NTE Price), and a Combination of T&M and Fixed Price. The detailed pricing schedule is provided in Annexure A, as specified in the tender documents.
The Supplier accepts the draft contract terms as outlined in the RFQ. A PDF copy of the Supplier's Deed of Undertaking, duly signed, is included as part of the Quotation submission.

The Supplier will provide each Plan in accordance with the COD and as set out in the Work Order. Our project management methodology is aligned with industry best practices, ensuring effective governance and reporting throughout the project lifecycle.

Responsibility for maintaining the DDM services suite lies with the Directorate of Digital Identity Services (DDIS) within Enterprise Technology Operations Branch (ETOB). The Supplier will adhere to the service management framework, including ITSM processes, SLAs, and escalation paths.

The Supplier will ensure that all Services are provided in accordance with the Deed and the Work Order, achieving the Milestones and/or Critical Milestones by the relevant Milestone Dates. Our transition approach includes structured phases to ensure seamless transition-in and transition-out processes.

The Supplier acknowledges that eTools has undergone consistent development and enhancement over the years to meet urgent business and security needs. We will address any documentation misalignments identified during the software development lifecycle to ensure full alignment with industry standards.

The Supplier's past performance will be evaluated based on methodology, past performance, technical merit, pricing, and compliance. We have included two case studies demonstrating our ability to deliver similar services successfully.

Quotations are to be lodged electronically via AusTender before the Closing Time. The Supplier agrees to complete and submit for Approval an AIC Schedule or AIC Plan as applicable. Reports will be provided in a format agreed between the parties.
